name: NexCampus v2.3.7
changelog: Weekly content delivery system — new guides, challenges, projects, and themes pushed weekly without reinstalling
Side-by-side Code Lab layout — editor and output side by side
8 auto-graded Python challenges with instant pass/fail scoring
Interactive mind map tool — canvas-based, drag nodes, export PNG
Procedural planet textures + atmospheric glow + lens flare for Solar System
Neon Tokyo theme — cyberpunk electric blue + magenta
Midnight Purple theme — deep violet with neon accents
Sidebar search — find any tool instantly
JavaScript runs in browser — no Node.js needed
Seamless self-update — one click, fully automatic
